title: Assyrian calendar
body: The Assyrian calendar (Syriac: ܣܘܼܪܓܵܕ݂ܵܐ ܐܵܬ݂ܘܿܪܵܝܵܐ sūrgāḏā ʾĀṯōrāyā) is a solar calendar used by modern Assyrian people.
categories: All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify
Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify from May 2024
